---
title: "Example future event"
date: "2026-09-01"
description: "A short description of the future event, talk, workshop, or public activity."
categories: [Talk, Cybernetics]
image: ../../images/activity-placeholder.png
---

Add the full event details here.

## Details

- **Role:** Speaker / panellist / facilitator
- **Host:** Organisation name
- **Location:** City or online
- **Links:** Slides, recording, event page
